titleStmt.title: SII 17.606: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 606. (A.R. No. 561 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the second prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
This record begins with the praśasti, Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga etc., of Kulōttuṅga I.

It seems to record some favour granted by god Vīdiviḍaṅgar of Tiruvārūr, in Tiruvārūr-kūṟṟam in Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu, when the god was seated in the hall called Dēvāśriyaṉ, witnessing a dance performance by Pukkatuṟai-vallavattalaikkōli. As the inscription is incomplete other details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
. svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭicūṭi mīṉavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉai maṉnavar tiritaluṟṟaḻitarat tikkaṉaittun taṉ cakka
ranaṭātti vīrasiṅhāsaṉattu Ulakuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecaripanma rāṉa tripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 9 Āvatu keyamāṇikka vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvārurk kūṟṟat
tut tiruvāruruṭaiyār vītiviṭaṅkadevar devāśriyaṉil Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu pukkatuṟaiva llavat talaikkoliyai Āṭṭaṅkaṇṭaruḷā niṟka naṅkollaril toṇṭaimāṉ peruṅ kollaṉ periṭṭu naIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.606 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
